name: meeting-facilitation-postprocess
description: Post-meeting follow-up flow: extract action items from the meeting transcript and run speaker fairness audit. Intended to run after the live meeting session finishes.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type without roles.
